summary: New multilingual models now achieve near-human accuracy across 100+ languages, reducing translation errors in medical and legal contexts by 40%.
The EU Digital Services Act now requires end-to-end encryption for all consumer video calls. Apps must disclose data retention policies clearly.

topic: Mobile data costs dropping in Latin America
summary: Average mobile data costs in Brazil, Mexico, and Colombia fell 25% in Q1 2026, enabling higher-quality video calls for more users.
